text: Board reiterates "unequivocal rejection" of Brave Bison's proposal
Shareholders Fidelity International (6.9%) & Aviva Investors (2.2%) tell press they will not accept increased proposal
AEW UK REIT plc's PUSU deadline changed from 13 August to 28 August
Recommended cash offer (scheme) of 503p per share for all shares in Rotork by ABB
Recommended cash offer of £1,230p per share for G&H by Arlington Capital Partners
